scripts.validate:vendor: node scripts/check-vendor-governance.mjs && node scripts/update-vendor.mjs && node scripts/check-vendor-upstream.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run build && npm run test:security
scripts.validate:full: npm run build && npm run check:generated && npm run test:security && npm run check:reading && npm run check:performance && npm run audit:high && npm run validate:vendor && npm run test:integration
